title: AWS IAM User
description: Schema representing an AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) user resource.

Path.description: The path to the user. For more information about paths, see IAM identifiers in the IAM User Guide.

UserName.description: The friendly name identifying the user.

UserId.description: The stable and unique string identifying the user. For more information about IDs, see IAM identifiers in the IAM User Guide.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the user.

CreateDate.description: The date and time, in ISO 8601 date-time format, when the user was created.

PasswordLastUsed.description: The date and time, in ISO 8601 date-time format, when the user's password was last used to sign in to an AWS website.

PermissionsBoundary.description: The ARN of the policy used to set the permissions boundary for the user.

PermissionsBoundaryArn.description: The ARN of the policy used to set the permissions boundary.

Tags.description: A list of tags attached to the user.

Key.description: The key name for the tag.

Value.description: The value associated with the tag.
